channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions First Phase of 33.335 MW BESS Project in Rajasthan
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Sun Power Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the first phase of a 33.335 MW/160.48 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project in Badi Sid, Phalodi and Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for this phase is set for March 08, 2026.

  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited commissions the first phase of a 33.335 MW/160.48 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project in Rajasthan.
  • The project is located at Village: Badi Sid, Tehsil-Bap, Dist: Phalodi and Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
  • The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the first phase is March 08, 2026.
  • The total capacity of the BESS Project is 300 MW/1400 MWh.
  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited is a significant player in the renewable energy sector.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MEESHO] Meesho Ltd Receives Assessment Order & Demand Notice from Income Tax Department for AY 2023-24
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Meesho Ltd has received an Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income-tax Act, 1961 and a Demand Notice under Section 156 of the IT Act dated March 05, 2026, from the Assessment Unit of the Income Tax Department for the Assessment Year 2023-24. The order and notice were received on March 06, 2026. The Income Tax Department has raised a tax demand of ₹ 1,499,73,82,840, including applicable interest. The Company is currently evaluating the Assessment Order and does not concur with the observations and adjustments made in the Order. Meesho believes that it has adequate legal and factual grounds to contest the same and is taking necessary steps to protect its interest. The Company had received a similar demand order for the previous Assessment Year (i.e., 2022-23), which was duly disclosed and is currently pending in the High Court of Karnataka.

  • Meesho Ltd received an Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income-tax Act, 1961 and a Demand Notice under Section 156 of the IT Act dated March 05, 2026.
  • The Income Tax Department has raised a tax demand of ₹ 1,499,73,82,840, including applicable interest for Assessment Year 2023-24.
  • The Company is currently evaluating the Assessment Order and does not concur with the observations and adjustments made in the Order.
  • Meesho believes that it has adequate legal and factual grounds to contest the same and is taking necessary steps to protect its interest.
  • A similar demand order was issued for the previous Assessment Year (i.e., 2022-23), which is currently pending in the High Court of Karnataka.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meesho Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [PWL] Physicswallah Ltd Sells 10% Stake in Wholly Owned Subsidiary Bharat Innovations Global
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Physicswallah Limited has sold 10% of its equity stake in Bharat Innovations Global Private Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary. This has resulted in Bharat Innovations Global Private Limited ceasing to be a wholly-owned subsidiary, but Physicswallah Ltd still holds 90% of the equity share capital, making Bharat Innovations Global a subsidiary. The sale was made to NSDC International Limited, a company registered under the Companies Act, 2013, and the consideration was received in the form of the brand name and goodwill of the acquirer, along with other specified terms in the agreement. The sale was not a related party transaction and was not part of a Scheme of Arrangement.

  • Physicswallah Ltd sells 10% stake in Bharat Innovations Global
  • Bharat Innovations Global Private Limited ceases to be a wholly-owned subsidiary
  • Consideration received in the form of brand name and goodwill
  • Buyer is NSDC International Limited
  • Not a related party transaction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Physicswallah Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [VIPIND] VIP Industries Ltd. Concludes GST Inspection with Rs. 5.48 Crores Liability Payment
item.description:
VIP Industries Ltd. has concluded the inspection proceedings conducted by the Goods & Service Tax Department, Maharashtra. The Company has paid a GST liability of Rs. 5.48 crores, with no material adverse findings or defaults. The financials, operations, and other activities of the Company remain unaffected, except for the aforementioned GST liability.

  • VIP Industries Ltd. has concluded GST inspection proceedings.
  • The Company paid a GST liability of Rs. 5.48 crores.
  • No material adverse findings or defaults were reported.
  • The Company's financials, operations, and other activities remain unaffected.
  • The inspection was conducted by the Goods & Service Tax Department, Maharashtra.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: V.I.P.INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [STRATMONT] Stratmont Industries Ltd Disinvests Entire Shareholding in Subsidiary Stratmont Coal and Commodity Private Limited
item.description:
Stratmont Industries Ltd has informed the exchange about the disinvestment of its entire shareholding in its subsidiary, Stratmont Coal and Commodity Private Limited. The disinvestment is carried out through a Share Purchase Agreement (‘SPA’). The subsidiary does not fall within the definition of a ‘Material Subsidiary’ as specified under Regulation 16(1)(c) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The sale/disposal amount is Rs. 99,000/- and the expected date of completion of sale/disposal is 06th March, 2026. The buyer, Mr. Vatsal Agarwaal, is an existing promoter of the company and the transaction is at arm's length.

  • Stratmont Industries Ltd disinvesting entire shareholding in Stratmont Coal and Commodity Private Limited
  • Disinvestment through Share Purchase Agreement (‘SPA’)
  • Subsidiary does not fall under ‘Material Subsidiary’ definition
  • Sale/disposal amount: Rs. 99,000/-
  • Transaction with existing promoter at arm's length

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Stratmont Industries Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [TVSMOTOR] TVS Motor Company Ltd Receives Listing, Trading Approval for 190,03,48,456 6% NCRPS
item.description:
TVS Motor Company Ltd has received listing and trading approvals from the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE) and BSE Limited (BSE) for its 190,03,48,456 6% Cumulative Non-Convertible Redeemable Preference Shares (NCRPS) issued pursuant to a Scheme of Arrangement. The NCRPS, with a face value of INR 10 each, will be available for trading on both stock exchanges from 10th March 2026. The ISIN for the NCRPS is INE494B04019, with NSE symbol TVSMNCRPS and BSE scrip code 717506.

  • TVS Motor Company Ltd receives listing and trading approvals for 190,03,48,456 6% NCRPS from NSE and BSE.
  • NCRPS with a face value of INR 10 each will be available for trading on both stock exchanges from 10th March 2026.
  • The ISIN for the NCRPS is INE494B04019, with NSE symbol TVSMNCRPS and BSE scrip code 717506.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TVS MOTOR COMPANY LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [FINOPB] Fino Payments Bank Ltd Appoints Ketan Merchant as Interim CEO and Anup Agarwal as Interim CFO
item.description:
Fino Payments Bank Ltd announced the appointment of Mr. Ketan Merchant as Interim Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Mr. Anup Agarwal as Interim Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Merchant will carry out duties of MD&CEO as per provisions of Section 10B(9) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 for a period not exceeding 4 months, subject to approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI). He is re-designated from Chief Financial Officer /Head of the Organisation to Interim CEO (Key Managerial Personnel) of the Bank. Agarwal, a Chartered Accountant with 20 years of experience in Finance, is appointed for a period not exceeding 4 months starting from March 06, 2026. He has held various positions across Deutsche Bank India, Standard Chartered Bank India & Maersk Group and leads the Head Finance - Investor Relation & Analytics in the Bank.

  • Appointment of Ketan Merchant as Interim CEO of Fino Payments Bank Ltd
  • Merchant to carry out duties of MD&CEO as per Section 10B(9) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949
  • Appointment of Anup Agarwal as Interim CFO of Fino Payments Bank Ltd
  • Agarwal has 20 years of experience in Finance and has held positions across Deutsche Bank India, Standard Chartered Bank India & Maersk Group
  • Appointments are subject to approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fino Payments Bank Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FINOPB] Fino Payments Bank Ltd: Ketan Merchant Appointed as Interim CEO, Anup Agarwal as Interim CFO
item.description:
Fino Payments Bank Ltd announced the appointment of Mr. Ketan Merchant as Interim Chief Executive Officer (Interim CEO) and Mr. Anup Agarwal as Interim Chief Financial Officer (CFO). The appointments were approved during the Board meeting held on March 06, 2026. Mr. Merchant, who has over 27 years of banking experience, will serve for a period not exceeding 4 months from the date of approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI). He was previously the Chief Financial Officer and Head of the Organization. Mr. Agarwal, a Chartered Accountant with 20 years of experience in finance, will also serve for a period not exceeding 4 months from March 06, 2026. He joined the Bank in June 2022 and leads the Head Finance - Investor Relation & Analytics in the Bank.

  • Appointment of Mr. Ketan Merchant as Interim CEO for a period not exceeding 4 months from the date of approval from RBI.
  • Mr. Merchant was previously the Chief Financial Officer and Head of the Organization.
  • Appointment of Mr. Anup Agarwal as Interim CFO for a period not exceeding 4 months from March 06, 2026.
  • Mr. Agarwal has 20 years of experience in finance and joined the Bank in June 2022.
  • The appointments were approved during the Board meeting held on March 06, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fino Payments Bank Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SPECTRUM] Spectrum Electrical Industries Acquires 100% Stake in Alric Electric for Rs.1,11,00,000
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Spectrum Electrical Industries Limited has announced the successful completion of the acquisition of 100% equity stake in Alric Electric Private Limited. The acquisition was completed on 6th March, 2026, where Spectrum acquired 10,000 equity shares, representing 100% of the equity share capital of Alric Electric, for a total amount of Rs.1,11,00,000. The acquisition was executed through Securities Transfer Forms in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Spectrum Electrical Industries acquires 100% stake in Alric Electric Private Limited
  • Total acquisition amount is Rs.1,11,00,000
  • Acquisition of 10,000 equity shares from existing shareholders
  • Completion date of acquisition is 6th March, 2026
  • Acquisition executed through Securities Transfer Forms as per Companies Act, 2013

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Spectrum Electrical Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook (India) Ltd Resolves Pending Dispute of Rs. 1,341.1 Mn for AY 2017-18
item.description:
Thomas Cook (India) Ltd has received an Order from the Office of the Assistant Commissioner of Income Tax Circle 1(3)(1), Mumbai regarding the resolution of a pending dispute of demand of Rs. 1,341.1 Mn for Assessment Year 2017-18. The dispute has been resolved with no financial impact on the company. This development is in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and the Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/1/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

  • Thomas Cook (India) Ltd has resolved a pending dispute of demand of Rs. 1,341.1 Mn for Assessment Year 2017-18.
  • The dispute has been resolved with no financial impact on the company.
  • The resolution is in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations and the Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/1/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Legal
